Virat Kohli Meets His Childhood Look-Alike Ahead of Thrilling India vs NZ ODI: 5 Incredible Moments!

Jan 12, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Virat Kohli Meets His Childhood Look-Alike Ahead of Thrilling India vs NZ ODI: 5 Incredible Moments!

Virat Kohli surprised fans by meeting a child who bears an uncanny resemblance to a young version of himself ahead of India’s first ODI against New Zealand. The heartwarming interaction, captured in viral photos and videos, quickly spread across social media as fans marveled at the striking similarity between the two.

Wearing a broad smile, Kohli happily signed autographs and interacted with several young fans in Vadodara, creating a memorable pre-match atmosphere. The moment added an emotional and lighter touch ahead of the highly anticipated ODI clash, further highlighting Kohli’s connection with fans both on and off the field.
